# Overview

## Headings Are Slides

- A `#` heading starts a **section**
- A `##` heading starts a **slide**

. . .

Pauses with `. . .` work too.

## Columns

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
A left column, half the width.
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
A right column next to it.
:::
::::

## Incremental

::: {.incremental}
- Revealed first
- Then second
- Then third
:::

## Emphasis and Buttons

- `.alert` for [emphasis]{.alert}, `.fg` for [colour]{.fg}, `.bg` for a
  [highlight]{.bg}
- Jump to the [[summary]{.button}](#sec-end) with a Beamer-style button

## Summary {#sec-end}

Built with [Touying](https://touying-typ.github.io) and Quarto.
